resources.string: No file picker is available on this device.
Opening the APK download in your browser.
No browser or download app is available on this device.
Are you connected to the Nexus WiFi?
The app could not reach SubLim3 Nexus. Make sure Nexus is powered on, join the Nexus WiFi or Wi-Fi Direct network, then swipe down from the top to refresh.

1. Make sure SubLim3 Nexus is powered on and finished booting.

2. Open your phone WiFi settings and connect to the Nexus WiFi / Wi-Fi Direct network.

3. If using Local/Recovery WiFi, the Nexus address is usually http://10.10.10.1:3000.

4. If using Home WiFi, make sure your phone is on the same router network and use the Nexus home address.

5. Return here and tap Try again, or swipe down from the top of the page to refresh.
Downloading and installing the latest Nexus release. Keep this app open.
The update request was sent. Waiting for Nexus Core to restart.
Waiting for Nexus Core to return.
Update complete. Nexus Core is back online.\n\n%1$s
Update failed. Nexus Core could not install the latest version.\n\nDetails: %1$s
The update may have completed, but the app could not confirm Nexus Core came back online before timeout.\n\nDetails: %1$s
Sending reboot request. Keep this app open.
Reboot request sent. Waiting for Nexus Core to return.
Reboot complete. Nexus Core is back online.\n\n%1$s
The reboot may have completed, but the app could not confirm Nexus Core came back online before timeout.\n\nDetails: %1$s
Preparing to shut down Nexus Core.
Sending shutdown request. Keep this app open until the request is accepted.
Shutdown requested. It is safe to disconnect power after the Pi turns off.
